adds.rationale: Rocket Lab delivered a record 2024 (16 Electron launches, up 60% YoY), inked a multi-launch Neutron commercial deal in November, and is the cleanest US-listed pure-play on the rockets/spacecraft wave the profile names as the first next-wave by commercial-impact horizon.

news_evidence.summary: Rocket Lab announced multi-launch Neutron agreement with a confidential commercial satellite constellation operator, two dedicated missions starting mid-2026

Rocket Lab 2024 annual report: 16 Electron launches in 2024 (record, +60% YoY); 54 successful orbital missions and 200+ spacecraft deployed through 12/31/2024; Archimedes engine test campaign underway for Neutron

removes.rationale: ARKX is a thinly-themed space ETF whose top holdings overlap with already-held names; replacing it with RKLB concentrates conviction in the rockets/spacecraft bucket on a pure-play with a documented 2024 commercial inflection rather than a diluted wrapper.

news_evidence.summary: ARKX (ARK Space Exploration & Innovation ETF) holdings drift toward general aerospace/defense and tech rather than pure rocketry; Rocket Lab itself is among its top weights, so swapping the wrapper for the single name preserves bucket exposure with higher conviction
news_evidence.source: ARK Invest fund page (composition disclosure as of year-end 2024)

rationale_overall: Swap ARKX for RKLB to sharpen the rockets/spacecraft bucket to a single-name pure-play with a documented 2024 commercial inflection.
